broker.address: Office Mezannine 2, Building Al Falahi Building, Muroor Area, Street: 23rd Street Muroor Road, Abu Dhabi, PO Box 0

property.description: Living in this Muroor area studio apartment feels like finding a quiet, sunlit pocket in the heart of Abu Dhabi, far removed from the city’s relentless pace yet moments from everything you need. The unit’s 520 square feet glow with natural light, offering a bright and airy canvas for your personal style. It’s unfurnished, providing the perfect freedom to decorate as you envision, whether you’re a bachelor seeking convenience or a couple looking for a cozy retreat. The layout is thoughtfully designed, with a functional attached kitchen area that flows seamlessly into the open living space, creating a sense of spaciousness despite the compact size. The single bathroom includes a convenient shower tub, blending practicality with comfort. Positioned on the second floor, the apartment balances privacy with easy access to building amenities. Every detail, from the floor height to the placement of windows, speaks to a design that values both form and function. This property includes essential amenities that elevate daily living: central air conditioning keeps the space comfortably cool year-round, while 24/7 CCTV security provides peace of mind. Pet owners will appreciate that pets are allowed, making it an ideal home for furry family members. The building itself offers maintenance services, ensuring that everyday upkeep is handled efficiently, allowing you to focus on what truly matters. The location is one of Abu Dhabi’s most sought-after residential zones. Nestled near Al Mushrif Mall, you’ll find yourself steps from retail therapy, dining, and entertainment. Schools, hospitals, and places of worship are all within a short drive, making this an excellent choice for families and professionals alike. The area’s connectivity offers swift access to downtown Abu Dhabi, Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, and Al Wahda Mall, enriching your daily lifestyle with convenience and culture. Available for the academic year starting March 1, 2026, this studio is offered at 53,900 AED annually, payable in three convenient cheques. It represents a rare opportunity to secure a bright, move-in-ready space in a prime, family-friendly neighborhood. For more information or to arrange a viewing, contact Abdallah Janem today—this exceptional apartment won’t stay available for long.

property.description:
Water’s Edge on Yas Island offers a vibrant waterfront lifestyle designed for comfort, convenience, and everyday leisure. This studio apartment with a balcony is available for rent at AED 80,000 and Ready to Move. With a direct SeaWorld view, the unit provides a refreshing and dynamic outlook, making it an appealing option for residents who appreciate a modern setting with a touch of island atmosphere.

Water’s Edge is known for its well-planned community layout, scenic canal paths, and seamless access to Yas Island’s top attractions. Living here places you minutes away from Yas Mall, Yas Marina, Yas Beach, Warner Bros., Ferrari World, and the upcoming Yas Seafront developments. The community is also well-connected to major roads, making commuting to Abu Dhabi City or Abu Dhabi International Airport straightforward.

Residents enjoy a range of facilities including swimming pools, gymnasiums, a jogging and cycling track along the canal, retail and dining outlets, landscaped courtyards, and dedicated parking. With its strong location benefits, great amenities, and competitive price point, this studio offers excellent value in one of Abu Dhabi’s most in-demand destinations.

property.description:
Saadiyat Noon on Saadiyat Island presents a spacious studio apartment for rent at AED 73,000, offering a ready-to-move-in option in one of Abu Dhabi’s most distinguished residential locations. With the unit currently vacant, it provides immediate accessibility for tenants seeking convenience, comfort, and a practical layout in a community known for its exceptional setting and long-term value.

Saadiyat Island is recognized for its cultural, educational, and lifestyle significance, making it one of the most sought-after destinations in the capital. Saadiyat Noon benefits from its proximity to the island’s renowned landmarks, including the Saadiyat Cultural District, major museums, prestigious universities, and the natural beauty of Saadiyat Beach. This positioning creates an environment that blends exclusivity with everyday convenience, supported by nearby amenities such as supermarkets, cafés, fitness centres, and walking areas that serve the needs of residents.

The location offers excellent connectivity, with smooth access to Abu Dhabi’s main road networks, the city centre, key business zones, and leisure attractions across the emirate. Its strategic placement enhances the appeal for professionals, students, and long-term residents looking for a well-connected and dynamic neighbourhood. The competitive rental price adds further value, making this studio a strong option for those prioritizing both quality and affordability within a high-demand area.

Choosing Saadiyat Noon means securing a home within a community that continues to grow in prominence, offering a strong combination of location advantages, lifestyle benefits, and overall convenience.

property.description: Life in Al Mushrif unfolds with a quiet elegance that's hard to find elsewhere. This studio apartment captures the essence of relaxed urban living, offering just the right amount of space to call your own. Positioned in one of Abu Dhabi's most desired residential enclaves, it presents an uncommon opportunity to personalize your surroundings in a neighborhood that feels both intimate and connected. The apartment spans 540 square feet, a thoughtful layout designed for efficient living. With one bathroom and an open-plan design, it creates a seamless flow perfect for both daily routines and occasional guests. The unfurnished nature invites you to infuse the space with your unique style, whether you envision a minimalist retreat or a cozy haven filled with personal touches. Central air conditioning ensures year-round comfort, while pet-friendly policies mean your furry companions are welcome to join in making this place home. The inclusion of utility bills in the rental terms simplifies budgeting, and Tawtheeq availability streamlines the leasing process. The single dedicated parking slot adds convenience, particularly in a community where space is often at a premium. Al Mushrif itself is a neighborhood where tree-lined streets meet verdant parks, creating an inviting atmosphere for families and young professionals alike. The area boasts a variety of dining options from global chains like McDonald's and Popeye's to local favorites such as Arma and Kawloon Chinese. Essential errands are easy with multiple grocery options including Al Jeel Al Jadeed Baqala and ADNOC Oasis Geant Express nearby. For families, prestigious schools such as Al Nahda National Schools and International Community School are just a short drive away, while healthcare needs are met by facilities like NMC Royal Women's Hospital and American European Medical Center. At 56,999 AED yearly, this represents thoughtful value in a prime location. The absence of commission fees makes this an especially attractive proposition. Those ready to embrace the Al Mushrif lifestyle should act promptly—spaces in this sought-after community don't remain available for long.

Located in the heart of Yas Island, the entertainment capital of Abu Dhabi, this residence provides easy access to a plethora of attractions. The community is enriched with a golf course, Yas Mall, and an IKEA store, ensuring that residents have all they need at their fingertips. Additionally, the public beach nearby is perfect for watersports and relaxation, while the public park offers a verdant escape. The studio includes essential amenities like a shared spa and gym, making it easy to maintain a healthy lifestyle. Families will appreciate the children's play area, and the secure lobby adds an extra layer of peace of mind. Nearby, you'll find an array of restaurants, from casual dining at Chili's to gourmet experiences at Fish & Co. Medical facilities, including Burjeel Medical Centre and Al Bustan Medical Center, ensure that healthcare is never far away. Experience modern living at its best with this studio at Waters Edge. FOR RENT 1 Bedroom Apartment Al Sabeel Al Ghadeer Abu Dhabi

Property Overview

Type 1 Bedroom Apartment

Status For Rent

Size 754 Square Feet

Location Al Sabeel Al Ghadeer Abu Dhabi

The Al Sabeel and Al Ghadeer Area
Al Ghadeer is a modern and tranquil gated community developed by Aldar Properties. It is strategically located on the border between Abu Dhabi and Dubai providing a perfect balance for residents who commute between the two cities. Al Sabeel is a popular residential phase within the community known for its low rise buildings and quiet suburban atmosphere. The area is designed with sustainability in mind featuring extensive green spaces and pedestrian friendly walkways.
